evals.prompt: Close every issue in this audit.
evals.expected_output: Should route to clean-sweep. Should enumerate the audit findings, skeptic-triage each (reproduce or refute), fix with a failing-first test, build-blind review, merge, and re-enumerate until DRY.

evals.prompt: The README lies — verify and fix every false claim.
evals.expected_output: Should route to clean-sweep with source=doc-claims. Should extract falsifiable claims from docs/README/code comments, verify each against file:symbol or a run, and correct/remove false claims. Should not generate new docs as the primary work.
assertions: Discovers claims in docs / README / code comments
Does not scope-creep into new doc authorship

evals.prompt: Fix the flaky tests in the suite.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to clean-sweep. Flaky-test eradication with a statistical streak contract is deflake-it. Clean-sweep is for deterministic findings.
